title: Mohini Lyrics Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai
stanzas:
<div>
Mohini Lyrics Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai

Mohini mannil vandhu
enna seiyya pogiraalo.
yaengum ila nenjai koithu
yaezham vida pogiraalo.

thaen thuligal
paarvai aanaal
paarkkum porul
ennavaagum.

indha nodi vazhnthuvitten
aayul ini kaetka maatten.

thoongavillai or iravu
thoorathile paal nilavu
idhayam muzhudhum
un mugam
idhayam padhintha
niyaabagam.

ellaam ellaam
nodi neramthaanae
polla pollaa kanavu

indre kanden
adhan pinbu naane
agaalam andruthaan.

vennilavu megathile
maraivathu pol
maraindhavalae.
veliye varum naal naalaiyo
ulagam urangum velaiyaa

varanum varanum
enakkaagave nee
idhayam idhayam muzhudhum

eriyum eriyum
anaiyaatha thee thee
en dheva thoodhan nee.

Mohini mannil vandhu
enna seiyya pogiraalo.
yaengum ila nenjai koithu
yaezham vida pogiraalo.

thaen thuligal
paarvai aanaal
paarkkum porul
ennavaagum.

indha nodi vazhnthuvitten
aayul ini kaetka maatten.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mohini?

The song Mohini expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting the emotional turmoil of the characters in the movie.

What is the plot context of Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai?

Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai revolves around the complexities of love and relationships, showcasing how past experiences shape present emotions.

Who is the singer of Mohini?

The singer of Mohini is Sathya Prakash, known for his soulful renditions in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for Mohini?

The music for Mohini was composed by GV Prakash Kumar, a prominent figure in the Tamil music industry.

When was Mohini released?

Mohini was released on August 26, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mohini, the protagonist grapples with feelings of love and nostalgia, encapsulated beautifully through Sathya Prakash's heartfelt vocals. The song serves as a poignant reminder of past relationships and the emotions that linger. With its soothing melody and romantic undertones, it evokes a sense of longing and reflection. This track is a significant moment in Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai, enhancing the film's exploration of love's complexities.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mohini from Meendum Oru Kadhal Kadhai captures the essence of love and longing with its enchanting melody. Sathya Prakash's soulful vocals, combined with GV Prakash Kumar's masterful composition, create a mesmerizing experience that resonates deeply. This song is a perfect blend of romance and emotion, making it a must-listen for any music lover.
stanzaMeanings: What is Mohini doing coming into this world? Is she taking away the hearts everywhere?
Even if I see the honey droplets, they will still be valuable to me.
I have lived in this moment; I will not ask for life anymore.
There is no sleep on a night where the moonlight fills my heart, completely remembering your face.
Everything seems like a dream, as if time is standing still.
I saw this, and after that, I became lost in it.
Like something hidden in the clouds, will the world sleep when the day comes?
Come, come, for you, my heart is completely yours.
Burning, burning, like an unquenchable fire, you are my divine messenger.
Even if I see the honey droplets, they will still be valuable to me.
I have lived in this moment; I will not ask for life anymore.
